payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a durable memory. Please tell me the specific AI-related fact, preference, project, goal, or instruction you want saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is overly broad and does not provide a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, or instruction to store.

details: No memory was stored because the request was too broad and not suitable as a durable personal memory.

repair_options: Specify a personal preference, e.g. "Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI topics."
Specify a project or goal, e.g. "Remember that I’m studying AI safety."
Specify an instruction, e.g. "Remember to explain machine learning concepts with examples."
Specify a relationship or context, e.g. "Remember that my work involves AI product management."
